name: libxmlrpc-lite-perl
title: libxmlrpc-lite-perl
summary: client and server implementation of the XML-RPC protocol
description:
client and server implementation of the XML-RPC protocol
XMLRPC::Lite provides a simple interface to the XML-RPC protocol on both
client and server side. Based on SOAP::Lite, it gives you access to all
features and transports available in that module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libxmlrpc-lite-perl because client and server implementation of the XML-RPC protocol.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libxmlrpc-lite-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libxmlrpc-lite-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libxmlrpc-lite-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
